title: Hungerford overhead line (TN/ MILA E4L5), S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  20 November 2025  Location   HungerfordNew Forest National ParkHampshireEngland   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line.
